top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 872
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 872
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;
